item.title: Calibre [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:title: Calibre [Ebook Software]
item.itunes:author: kushagrakarira
item.itunes:summary:
Calibre
(Ebook Software)
Calibre (/ˈkælɪbər/, stylised calibre) is a cross-platform free and open-source suite of e-book software. Calibre supports organizing existing e-books into virtual libraries, displaying, editing, creating and converting e-books, as well as syncing e-books with a variety of e-readers. Editing books is supported for EPUB and AZW3 formats. Books in other formats like MOBI must first be converted to those formats, if they are to be edited.

[read more]
item.description:
Calibre
(Ebook Software)
Calibre (/ˈkælɪbər/, stylised calibre) is a cross-platform free and open-source suite of e-book software. Calibre supports organizing existing e-books into virtual libraries, displaying, editing, creating and converting e-books, as well as syncing e-books with a variety of e-readers. Editing books is supported for EPUB and AZW3 formats. Books in other formats like MOBI must first be converted to those formats, if they are to be edited.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Calibre
(Ebook Software)
Calibre (/ˈkælɪbər/, stylised calibre) is a cross-platform free and open-source suite of e-book software. Calibre supports organizing existing e-books into virtual libraries, displaying, editing, creating and converting e-books, as well as syncing e-books with a variety of e-readers. Editing books is supported for EPUB and AZW3 formats. Books in other formats like MOBI must first be converted to those formats, if they are to be edited.

[read more]

item.title: Desktop Magic [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Desktop Magic [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: clearall2
item.itunes:summary:
Desktop Magic
(Utilities)
A simple tool which can create snow, flowers, bubble,... effect on your PC.
Some features:
-Can create many types of effect.
-Can modify speed, number, direction.
-Can run on scheduled time.
-Can play music.
[read more]
item.description:

(Utilities)
A simple tool which can create snow, flowers, bubble,... effect on your PC.
Some features:
-Can create many types of effect.
-Can modify speed, number, direction.
-Can run on scheduled time.
-Can play music.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Desktop Magic
(Utilities)
A simple tool which can create snow, flowers, bubble,... effect on your PC.
Some features:
-Can create many types of effect.
-Can modify speed, number, direction.
-Can run on scheduled time.
-Can play music.
[read more]

item.title: plasma 6 cloner [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: plasma 6 cloner [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
plasma 6 cloner
(Utilities)
claudemods plasma6 cloner v1.02 28/07/2024

first of all id like to credit Paju as i used some of his script from his widget
find his plasma 5 widget here >>> https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/

slight error in application name and file name upon testing updates in shown in photo
its not called main.py its called cloner.py

v1.02 28/07/2024
updated qml application making it look nicer
all functions work same as before
v1.01 incase you like my old version
guide to cloning and backing up your plasma theme is the same

v1.01
standard python script with functions for cloning and installing
gui application it was buggy thats why i updated

instructions to cloning

make your theme on breeze light only
you can change everything such as
desktop photo
taskbar layout including widgets
colours
ect.......

run the python script from konsole
python cloner.py the script will make a clone into name folder keep that safe



instructions to installing a clone

the cloner.py script needs to be in the same directory of the folder named PlasmaConfigBackup you created
run the script and install your custom cloned plasma 6 theme

additionals

i have made 3 themes that can be tested as templates
please put the desired theme e.g 1 2 or 3 into the location where the python script is
use the method to install the theme above
theme 1 needs the claudemods-apps folder in /opt please copy this folder before using theme 1

the gui application is still in beta please use with caution though for the most part it worked from testing

v1.03 not released yet..........
things being considered
adding plasma sounds to the mix
adding sddm login photos to the mix
adding plasma window decorations into the mix
not to sure if v1.02 fixes the breeze light only issue
but i will test when i have the chance
if not i have plans to add this into the mix

any help or feedback towards this project would be nice
leave a comment make a suggestion
support my work on paypal with link below
https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

[read more]
item.description:
plasma 6 cloner
(Utilities)
claudemods plasma6 cloner v1.02 28/07/2024

first of all id like to credit Paju as i used some of his script from his widget
find his plasma 5 widget here >>> https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/

slight error in application name and file name upon testing updates in shown in photo
its not called main.py its called cloner.py

v1.02 28/07/2024
updated qml application making it look nicer
all functions work same as before
v1.01 incase you like my old version
guide to cloning and backing up your plasma theme is the same

v1.01
standard python script with functions for cloning and installing
gui application it was buggy thats why i updated

instructions to cloning

make your theme on breeze light only
you can change everything such as
desktop photo
taskbar layout including widgets
colours
ect.......

run the python script from konsole
python cloner.py the script will make a clone into name folder keep that safe



instructions to installing a clone

the cloner.py script needs to be in the same directory of the folder named PlasmaConfigBackup you created
run the script and install your custom cloned plasma 6 theme

additionals

i have made 3 themes that can be tested as templates
please put the desired theme e.g 1 2 or 3 into the location where the python script is
use the method to install the theme above
theme 1 needs the claudemods-apps folder in /opt please copy this folder before using theme 1

the gui application is still in beta please use with caution though for the most part it worked from testing

v1.03 not released yet..........
things being considered
adding plasma sounds to the mix
adding sddm login photos to the mix
adding plasma window decorations into the mix
not to sure if v1.02 fixes the breeze light only issue
but i will test when i have the chance
if not i have plans to add this into the mix

any help or feedback towards this project would be nice
leave a comment make a suggestion
support my work on paypal with link below
https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
plasma 6 cloner
(Utilities)
claudemods plasma6 cloner v1.02 28/07/2024

first of all id like to credit Paju as i used some of his script from his widget
find his plasma 5 widget here >>> https://store.kde.org/p/1298955/

slight error in application name and file name upon testing updates in shown in photo
its not called main.py its called cloner.py

v1.02 28/07/2024
updated qml application making it look nicer
all functions work same as before
v1.01 incase you like my old version
guide to cloning and backing up your plasma theme is the same

v1.01
standard python script with functions for cloning and installing
gui application it was buggy thats why i updated

instructions to cloning

make your theme on breeze light only
you can change everything such as
desktop photo
taskbar layout including widgets
colours
ect.......

run the python script from konsole
python cloner.py the script will make a clone into name folder keep that safe



instructions to installing a clone

the cloner.py script needs to be in the same directory of the folder named PlasmaConfigBackup you created
run the script and install your custom cloned plasma 6 theme

additionals

i have made 3 themes that can be tested as templates
please put the desired theme e.g 1 2 or 3 into the location where the python script is
use the method to install the theme above
theme 1 needs the claudemods-apps folder in /opt please copy this folder before using theme 1

the gui application is still in beta please use with caution though for the most part it worked from testing

v1.03 not released yet..........
things being considered
adding plasma sounds to the mix
adding sddm login photos to the mix
adding plasma window decorations into the mix
not to sure if v1.02 fixes the breeze light only issue
but i will test when i have the chance
if not i have plans to add this into the mix

any help or feedback towards this project would be nice
leave a comment make a suggestion
support my work on paypal with link below
https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/claudemods?country.x=GB&locale

item.title: Removable Media Data Rescue Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Removable Media Data Rescue Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
Removable Media Data Rescue Tool
(Utilities)
Removable media lost data recovery software. Removable media data retrieval utility restores deleted images, music data files. Removable media data recovery tool recovers erased or damaged photo, digital image, office file. Smart media data salvage utility easily retrieves lost data from formatted or corrupted external USB media like iPod, MMC, sD, xD card, digital camera. Removable media file backup tool ensures complete data recovery from accidentally formatted or logically crashed USB drives, memory cards, iPods etc. Smart media files recovery software supports restoration of all formats of photos, images, music, audio, video files lost due to virus affect, accidental deletion or formatted media. Removable media data recovery software deeply scans storage media drives and restores all lost or deleted files

[read more]
item.description:
Removable Media Data Rescue Tool
(Utilities)
Removable media lost data recovery software. Removable media data retrieval utility restores deleted images, music data files. Removable media data recovery tool recovers erased or damaged photo, digital image, office file. Smart media data salvage utility easily retrieves lost data from formatted or corrupted external USB media like iPod, MMC, sD, xD card, digital camera. Removable media file backup tool ensures complete data recovery from accidentally formatted or logically crashed USB drives, memory cards, iPods etc. Smart media files recovery software supports restoration of all formats of photos, images, music, audio, video files lost due to virus affect, accidental deletion or formatted media. Removable media data recovery software deeply scans storage media drives and restores all lost or deleted files

[read more]

(Utilities)
Removable media lost data recovery software. Removable media data retrieval utility restores deleted images, music data files. Removable media data recovery tool recovers erased or damaged photo, digital image, office file. Smart media data salvage utility easily retrieves lost data from formatted or corrupted external USB media like iPod, MMC, sD, xD card, digital camera. Removable media file backup tool ensures complete data recovery from accidentally formatted or logically crashed USB drives, memory cards, iPods etc. Smart media files recovery software supports restoration of all formats of photos, images, music, audio, video files lost due to virus affect, accidental deletion or formatted media. Removable media data recovery software deeply scans storage media drives and restores all lost or deleted files

[read more]

item.title: Recover Photos [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Recover Photos [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Photos
(Utilities)
Website www.photo-engineering.com provides Recover Photos application to rescue misplaced digital photographs of any memorable wedding party from inaccessible USB drives such as flash drive, pen drive, thumb drive etc. Proficient photo recovery utility provides simple GUI wizard for getting back lost desktop wallpapers including 2D, 3D both from crashed hard disk drive. Featured photo recovery software provides inbuilt features to rescue erased pictures from fixed or USB supported drives.

[read more]
item.description:
Recover Photos
(Utilities)
Website www.photo-engineering.com provides Recover Photos application to rescue misplaced digital photographs of any memorable wedding party from inaccessible USB drives such as flash drive, pen drive, thumb drive etc. Proficient photo recovery utility provides simple GUI wizard for getting back lost desktop wallpapers including 2D, 3D both from crashed hard disk drive. Featured photo recovery software provides inbuilt features to rescue erased pictures from fixed or USB supported drives.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Recover Photos
(Utilities)
Website www.photo-engineering.com provides Recover Photos application to rescue misplaced digital photographs of any memorable wedding party from inaccessible USB drives such as flash drive, pen drive, thumb drive etc. Proficient photo recovery utility provides simple GUI wizard for getting back lost desktop wallpapers including 2D, 3D both from crashed hard disk drive. Featured photo recovery software provides inbuilt features to rescue erased pictures from fixed or USB supported drives.

[read more]

item.title: USB Thumb Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: USB Thumb Drive Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
USB Thumb Drive Data Recovery
(Utilities)
USB thumb drive data rescue tool backup files. USB thumb drive data recovery application retrieves memory stick lost data files.>USB thumb drive data retrieval application support data restoration from corrupted or undetected flash memory drive. USB memory stick data backup tool support recovery of deleted, missing data from any USB drive with capacities like 16GB, 32GB, 64GB, 128GB, 132GB, 512MB, 216MB and even higher. Software compatible with all Microsoft Windows operating system such as Windows 11, Windows 10,Windows 8, Windows 7.USB key drive data rescue utility has GUI functionality which provides USB key drive files restoration of formatted, deleted or corrupted USB drives due to virus attack, system faults, software malfunctioning, improper usage, inaccessible drive and other data loss reasons very easily and securely. USB thumb drive files backup reviews lost data, recover formatted or damaged files before you fix and repair your corrupted storage device. USB thumb drive data retrieval tool used for complete restoration even from deleted files folders and accidentally formatted USB removable media. USB jump drive data restore application also includes support for compact flash, removable micro drive, smart drive and media flash memory etc in all major data storage capacities including 16GB, 32GB, 64GB, 128GB, 132GB, 512MB, 216MB and even higher capacity drives. USB jump drive retrieval tool shows thumbnail preview of all lost data before starting recovery process. USB drive files restore utility recover deleted text, lost images, inaccessible music and undetected MS Word, Excel, Access, Power point doc, xls, mdb, JPG, GIF, BMP, Mp3, DAT files. Support all major brands of USB removable media including Sony, Transcend, Jet Flash, Yakumo, Minolta, Nikon, HP, Fuji film, SanDisk, Kingmax, Lexar, Ridata, Apacer. USB flash stick files recovery application helps you to select data which you want to recover back by showing the preview of files before restoring the original structure of files and folders.

[read more]
item.description:
USB Thumb Drive Data Recovery
(Utilities)
USB thumb drive data rescue tool backup files. USB thumb drive data recovery application retrieves memory stick lost data files.>USB thumb drive data retrieval application support data restoration from corrupted or undetected flash memory drive. USB memory stick data backup tool support recovery of deleted, missing data from any USB drive with capacities like 16GB, 32GB, 64GB, 128GB, 132GB, 512MB, 216MB and even higher. Software compatible with all Microsoft Windows operating system such as Windows 11, Windows 10,Windows 8, Windows 7.USB key drive data rescue utility has GUI functionality which provides USB key drive files restoration of formatted, deleted or corrupted USB drives due to virus attack, system faults, software malfunctioning, improper usage, inaccessible drive and other data loss reasons very easily and securely. USB thumb drive files backup reviews lost data, recover formatted or damaged files before you fix and repair your corrupted storage device. USB thumb drive data retrieval tool used for complete restoration even from deleted files folders and accidentally formatted USB removable media. USB jump drive data restore application also includes support for compact flash, removable micro drive, smart drive and media flash memory etc in all major data storage capacities including 16GB, 32GB, 64GB, 128GB, 132GB, 512MB, 216MB and even higher capacity drives. USB jump drive retrieval tool shows thumbnail preview of all lost data before starting recovery process. USB drive files restore utility recover deleted text, lost images, inaccessible music and undetected MS Word, Excel, Access, Power point doc, xls, mdb, JPG, GIF, BMP, Mp3, DAT files. Support all major brands of USB removable media including Sony, Transcend, Jet Flash, Yakumo, Minolta, Nikon, HP, Fuji film, SanDisk, Kingmax, Lexar, Ridata, Apacer. USB flash stick files recovery application helps you to select data which you want to recover back by showing the preview of files before restoring the original structure of files and folders.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
USB Thumb Drive Data Recovery
(Utilities)
USB thumb drive data rescue tool backup files. USB thumb drive data recovery application retrieves memory stick lost data files.>USB thumb drive data retrieval application support data restoration from corrupted or undetected flash memory drive. USB memory stick data backup tool support recovery of deleted, missing data from any USB drive with capacities like 16GB, 32GB, 64GB, 128GB, 132GB, 512MB, 216MB and even higher. Software compatible with all Microsoft Windows operating system such as Windows 11, Windows 10,Windows 8, Windows 7.USB key drive data rescue utility has GUI functionality which provides USB key drive files restoration of formatted, deleted or corrupted USB drives due to virus attack, system faults, software malfunctioning, improper usage, inaccessible drive and other data loss reasons very easily and securely. USB thumb drive files backup reviews lost data, recover formatted or damaged files before you fix and repair your corrupted storage device. USB thumb drive data retrieval tool used for complete restoration even from deleted files folders and accidentally formatted USB removable media. USB jump drive data restore application also includes support for compact flash, removable micro drive, smart drive and media flash memory etc in all major data storage capacities including 16GB, 32GB, 64GB, 128GB, 132GB, 512MB, 216MB and even higher capacity drives. USB jump drive retrieval tool shows thumbnail preview of all lost data before starting recovery process. USB drive files restore utility recover deleted text, lost images, inaccessible music and undetected MS Word, Excel, Access, Power point doc, xls, mdb, JPG, GIF, BMP, Mp3, DAT files. Support all major brands of USB removable media including Sony, Transcend, Jet Flash, Yakumo, Minolta, Nikon, HP, Fuji film, SanDisk, Kingmax, Lexar, Ridata, Apacer. USB flash stick files recovery application helps you to select data which you want to recover back by showing the preview of files before restoring the original structure of files and folders.

[read more]

item.title: hitclubgripe [Various Games]
item.itunes:title: hitclubgripe [Various Games]
item.itunes:author: hitclubgripe1
item.itunes:summary:
hitclubgripe
(Various Games)
Hit Club – Cổng game đổi thưởng giải trí uy tín hàng đầu, đa dạng trò chơi hấp dẫn, đổi thưởng nhanh chóng, bảo mật tuyệt đối. Trải nghiệm giải trí đỉnh cao tại Hit Club ngay hôm nay!
Website : https://hitclub.gripe/
Hotline : 0988777999
Địa chỉ : 17 Nguyễn Trãi, P.2, Q.5, TP.HCM
Email : support@hitclubgripe.com
Hastag : #hitclub, #hitclubgripe
[read more]

Email : support@hitclubgripe.com
Hastag : #hitclub, #hitclubgripe
[read more]

item.title: Photo Recovery Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Photo Recovery Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
Photo Recovery Utility
(Utilities)
Photo Recovery Utility from www.photo-engineering.com provides facility to regain accidentally deleted files from SD cards that lost due to human errors or improper shutdown of operating system during unexpected electricity cuts.File restore tool recovers erased multimedia files from corrupted pen drives at any time. Company website www.photo-engineering.com offers Photo Recovery Utility which brings back your missing documents from office computer in different file formats such as JPEG, JPG, GIF, AVI movie etc. and supports data recovery from media of all popular manufacturers including Sony, Nikon, Samsung, Toshiba etc.

[read more]
item.description:
Photo Recovery Utility
(Utilities)
Photo Recovery Utility from www.photo-engineering.com provides facility to regain accidentally deleted files from SD cards that lost due to human errors or improper shutdown of operating system during unexpected electricity cuts.File restore tool recovers erased multimedia files from corrupted pen drives at any time. Company website www.photo-engineering.com offers Photo Recovery Utility which brings back your missing documents from office computer in different file formats such as JPEG, JPG, GIF, AVI movie etc. and supports data recovery from media of all popular manufacturers including Sony, Nikon, Samsung, Toshiba etc.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Photo Recovery Utility
(Utilities)
Photo Recovery Utility from www.photo-engineering.com provides facility to regain accidentally deleted files from SD cards that lost due to human errors or improper shutdown of operating system during unexpected electricity cuts.File restore tool recovers erased multimedia files from corrupted pen drives at any time. Company website www.photo-engineering.com offers Photo Recovery Utility which brings back your missing documents from office computer in different file formats such as JPEG, JPG, GIF, AVI movie etc. and supports data recovery from media of all popular manufacturers including Sony, Nikon, Samsung, Toshiba etc.

[read more]

item.title: Mobile Phone Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mobile Phone Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: photorecover1
item.itunes:summary:
Mobile Phone Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Do you want to bring back your crucial data from formatted cell phone devices in simplified manner? Use highly reliable and cost effective Mobile Phone Data Recovery application that is designed specifically to retrieve songs, movies, images, picture, audios, videos, screensavers, wallpapers etc from your cell phone memory misplaced due to various data loss circumstances in quick time without affecting quality of files.

[read more]
item.description:
Mobile Phone Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Do you want to bring back your crucial data from formatted cell phone devices in simplified manner? Use highly reliable and cost effective Mobile Phone Data Recovery application that is designed specifically to retrieve songs, movies, images, picture, audios, videos, screensavers, wallpapers etc from your cell phone memory misplaced due to various data loss circumstances in quick time without affecting quality of files.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Mobile Phone Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Do you want to bring back your crucial data from formatted cell phone devices in simplified manner? Use highly reliable and cost effective Mobile Phone Data Recovery application that is designed specifically to retrieve songs, movies, images, picture, audios, videos, screensavers, wallpapers etc from your cell phone memory misplaced due to various data loss circumstances in quick time without affecting quality of files.

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
